title: Tapestry Webhook Payload
description: Standardized JSON payload for the n8n /webhook/tapestry endpoint, triggered by Rabbit R1 or OpenClaw.

intent.description: The primary command or action requested (e.g., 'rego', 'SPER', 'BlueCare'). Used by n8n to route to the correct agent.

source.description: The origin of the webhook request.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the intent was captured.

parameters.description: Optional key-value pairs providing specific details for the intent.

raw_text.description: The raw voice transcript or CLI input string, useful for logging or fallback LLM parsing.

urgency.description: Indicates the priority of the task.
